title: Marine Superintendent
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate, arrange, and follow up on Oil Major Vetting Inspections as directed.
  • Attend vessels to conduct Marine Inspections, Pre-Vetting Inspections, or provide vetting assistance, ensuring all findings and follow-up actions are properly recorded and filed.
  • Carry out annual onboard navigation audits (preferably during short voyages), input results into the audit database, and ensure timely closure of deficiencies.
  • Serve as a member of the ASL Emergency Response Team.
  • Coordinate external safety audits and onboard training sessions with appointed auditors or training providers.
  • Support vessel cosmetic maintenance and upgrades (e.g., painting).
  • Monitor and assist vessels, in coordination with Operations, on matters such as loading, discharging, tank cleaning, and grade changes.
  • Assist in implementing Health, Safety, Security, Quality, and Environmental (HSSEQ) policies, including short onboard voyages for HSSEQ system rollout on new vessels.
  • Contribute to periodic management reviews of the HSSEQ system, documenting findings and proposing corrective actions.
  • Assist in investigating incidents, accidents, and near misses, including root cause analysis and follow-up.
  • Support the preparation, implementation, and maintenance of contingency plans for both office and vessels.
  • Liaise with vessels on safety, navigation, operational, and environmental matters, including responding to monthly safety and near-miss reports.

Requirements:

  • Strong knowledge of maritime regulations and industry standards.
  • Preferably experienced in Ship Vetting (by Oil Majors), as well as Ship and Terminal Operations.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
